name: Coalition Against 1080 Poison
summary: Campaign coalition focused on ending the use of 1080 poison in Australia.
description: Directly relevant to Bite Back's 1080 to Zero campaign, especially public pressure, community testimony and phase-out advocacy.
alignment: Listed because its campaign aim overlaps with Bite Back's national 1080 phase-out work.
